title: Audience vs Customer
context: Creator economy, business building, audience ownership, and monetization
surface_question: Is having an audience the same as having a business?
b_root: A person exchanging money for value.
a_causal_chain: content -> attention -> repeated exposure -> trust -> interest -> possible offer response
b_causal_chain: need -> offer -> perceived value -> payment -> delivery -> satisfaction or churn
hidden_similarity: Both are relationships based on perceived value.
hidden_difference: Audience gives attention. Customer gives payment.
a_failure_mode: Audience fails when attention does not convert into trust, need, offer response, or payment.
b_failure_mode: Customer relationship fails when the paid value does not satisfy the promise.
conditional_verdict: Build audience for reach, but build customers for income.
final_line: An audience gives attention. A customer gives payment.
